name: pepite
description: Pépite — agent CMO autonome (VPS, sans Vercel/Next.js/Claude Agent SDK)

scripts.check: for f in scripts/lib/cli.js scripts/supabase_query.js scripts/supabase_upsert.js scripts/github_create_branch.js scripts/github_commit_changes.js scripts/github_open_pr_or_push.js scripts/fetch_ga4_report.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && echo OK
